summary: CRITICAL: Policy logic bug (lines 46-87) — each retention policy overwrites previous ones instead of combining, so only the last policy applied actually executes. Incomplete: Invoke-CleanupPlan and Format-DeletionSummary are stubs, never integrated. Missing Set-StrictMode, workflow permissions block, and error handling for actual deletion. Tests don't verify policy interactions or integration scenarios. Workflow validates YAML/tests but not artifact cleanup correctness.
